states.description: Main map with Product Hub promotional banner
Search overlay with history and category icons
Search overlay for setting Work address
Map settings secondary submenu (My places, etc.)
Map screen showing No internet connection error
Confirmation dialog for clearing search history
Select point screen for choosing a map location

transitions.postcondition: App launches to last map view

strategies.name: SET_WORK_ADDRESS_VIA_HISTORY
strategies.preconditions: map_main with Work button visible in bottom bar
steps: click Work button to open work_address_search
type the POI name (e.g., 'Microsoft headquarters Redmond') into the search field
if results found, tap the matching result; if app shows history entry from a previous typed query, tap that entry
confirm selection saves it as Work address
strategies.success_signal: Returns to map view with Work pin set and toast/check indicating saved
strategies.fallback: If POI not found, try simpler/canonical name or skip and mark infeasible

strategies.name: INITIATE_ROUTE
steps: click Route icon in bottom navigation
type or pick destination from search history
wait for route panel to compute distance/time
strategies.success_signal: Route polyline drawn and distance/time displayed in route panel
strategies.fallback: If destination not found, try alternate name or canonical address

strategies.name: FIND_NEAREST_POI
steps: tap a category chip (e.g., Hotel, Groceries) or type category keyword
review search results list ordered by distance
tap nearest result to view details
strategies.success_signal: Results list shows POIs with distances; nearest entry selectable
strategies.fallback: If 'didn't find anything', zoom in, ensure map is centered on user location, or try synonym (grocery store vs supermarket)

dead_ends.note: Offline map of Chico has no global POI data; brand-name searches consistently return 'didn't find anything'
Re-issuing identical or near-identical queries yields the same empty result; agent loops

dead_ends.failed_action: clicking Map style / Map settings repeatedly to dismiss
dead_ends.note: Overlay must be dismissed with navigate_back, not by tapping internal toggles
Device-level offline state cannot be resolved inside app; tasks needing online search become infeasible

dead_ends.failed_action: repeated scroll up/down to reveal route inputs
dead_ends.note: Product Hub banner is fixed; route planner is opened via the Route icon, not by scrolling

dead_ends.failed_action: input destination that has typo or non-indexed name
dead_ends.note: Search returns no results; route cannot be computed

categories.name: SET_SAVED_PLACE
categories.precondition: App is open at a state exposing a 'Saved place' shortcut (e.g., Home/Work)
abstract_steps: Open the saved-place editor for the target slot
Enter a query identifying the desired location
Select a matching result from suggestions or the map
Confirm to persist the saved place
failure_modes: Offline data set lacks the target POI
Query is too generic or misspelled
User exits editor before confirming, losing changes
Search returns history entries that are not real POIs
verification_checklist: After confirmation, the saved slot displays the chosen location name
Re-opening the slot shows the new address
Map shows a pin/icon for the saved place

categories.name: COMPUTE_ROUTE
categories.precondition: App is open with route/directions feature accessible
abstract_steps: Open route planner
Set origin (current location or specific place)
Set destination via search or map tap
Choose travel mode (drive/walk/transit/bike) if applicable
Wait for route calculation and read distance/time
failure_modes: Origin or destination cannot be found in available data
Selected travel mode unsupported in region/offline
Connectivity required but unavailable
Promotional banner obscures route inputs and agent loops scrolling
verification_checklist: Both endpoints visible in route panel
A route line is drawn on the map
Numeric distance and ETA are displayed
Travel mode indicator matches the intended mode

categories.name: QUERY_NEAREST_POI
categories.precondition: App is open with search functionality and current/user location available
abstract_steps: Open search
Enter category keyword or tap category chip
Allow app to return ranked list by proximity
Pick top/nearest result
failure_modes: Map data offline and lacks POI category
Search term overly specific or misspelled
No internet for online POI lookups
User location not set, so distances cannot be ranked
verification_checklist: Results list shows at least one POI with distance
Nearest entry is highlighted or top of list
Selecting it reveals its details and map pin

categories.name: RECOVER_FROM_EMPTY_SEARCH
categories.precondition: A search has returned an empty result
abstract_steps: Clear the query field
Try a broader/simpler term or canonical name
If still empty, try a synonym or related category
If repeated failures, abandon and mark task infeasible
failure_modes: Repeatedly re-issuing the same query
Concatenating new text onto leftover text in field
Mistaking offline-data limitation for a typo
verification_checklist: Each retry uses a meaningfully different term
Loop is bounded (e.g., max 3 retries) before declaring infeasible

categories.name: DISMISS_OVERLAY
categories.precondition: A modal overlay or settings panel is blocking the main view
abstract_steps: Use system back/navigate-back gesture
If back fails, look for explicit close affordance
Avoid tapping internal toggles thinking they dismiss the overlay
failure_modes: Tapping header items toggles internal state instead of closing
Repeatedly clicking same element with no effect
Confusing overlay with main screen
verification_checklist: Subsequent actions on main view succeed

categories.name: HANDLE_OFFLINE_STATE
categories.precondition: App reports no internet and required feature needs online data
abstract_steps: Attempt one retry of network action
If still offline, exit app or check device network settings
If device cannot be brought online, declare task infeasible
failure_modes: Looping on Retry without network change
Navigating to device settings but not toggling connectivity
Assuming offline maps cover online-only POIs
verification_checklist: Previously failing search/route now returns data
